item.title: [信号 8.0] Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
item.description:
AI Score: 9.0

Signal Score: 8.0

Anthropic announces a $65B Series H round at a $965B post-money valuation and cites rapid enterprise adoption with $47B run-rate revenue.

Tags: #AI, #Funding, #Anthropic, #Market dynamics, #Enterprise AI

Read original

item.title: [信号 8.0] ♻️ 黄仁勋：英伟达已基本放弃中国 AI 芯片市场 Nvidia CEO 黄仁勋表示，受美国出口管制影响，Nvidia 已"基本放弃"中国 AI 芯片市场，将
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 8.0

黄仁勋称受美国出口管制影响，英伟达对在华销售先进AI芯片许可不抱期望，基本退出中国AI芯片市场并让出空间给华为等本土生态。

Tags: #NVIDIA, #Export Controls, #AI Chips, #China Tech, #Semiconductors

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] Claude Opus 4.8
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.8 with incremental improvements and signals an upcoming higher-capability Mythos-class model gated by stronger cyber safety measures.

Tags: #LLMs, #Anthropic-Claude, #model-releases, #AI-safety, #cybersecurity

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 黄仁勋称台湾是 AI 革命中心，英伟达计划每年在台湾投入 1500 亿美元
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

黄仁勋称台湾将成为AI革命中心，英伟达计划把在台年度投入提升至约1500亿美元，并建设台北新总部以强化AI芯片与系统供应链合作。

Tags: #NVIDIA, #AI硬件, #半导体供应链, #台湾, #TSMC

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 中国将为人形机器人分配数字 ID
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

中国将通过国家级平台为国内制造的AI双足人形机器人分配唯一数字ID，用于生产到回收的全流程追踪与风险监测，并推动行业标准化。

Tags: #robotics, #policy-regulation, #industry-standards, #traceability, #china

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 比亚迪发布 4nm 智驾芯片“璇玑 A3”
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

比亚迪在发布会上推出并宣布已规模量产4nm智驾芯片“璇玑A3”，称可支持L3/L4自动驾驶且三芯片合计算力超过2100 TOPS。

Tags: #automotive-ai-chips, #autonomous-driving, #semiconductors, #BYD, #edge-compute

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] EU fines Temu €200M for allowing sale of illegal products
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 7.0

The EU fined Temu €200M for allowing illegal products to be sold on its marketplace, sparking discussion about enforcement practicality and parity with other platforms.

Tags: #EU regulation, #e-commerce marketplaces, #product compliance, #platform enforcement, #cross-border trade

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 📱YouTube 调整 AI 视频标注，未申报内容也可能自动加标签
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 7.0

YouTube将从2026年5月起把逼真AI内容标签放到更显眼位置，并在检测到未申报的显著AI生成/修改时自动标注且部分情况下永久保留。

Tags: #YouTube, #AI内容标注, #平台政策, #内容审核, #C2PA

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Building durable workflows on Postgres
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 6.0

The piece argues that Postgres can serve as the primary substrate for durable workflow execution, prompting community comparison to dedicated workflow engines like Temporal and alternative Postgres-backed implementations.

Tags: #postgresql, #distributed-systems, #workflow-orchestration, #durable-execution, #backend-engineering

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 开源项目分享：DOMD：从零自研渲染引擎的 Markdown 所见即所得编辑器（开源 / 本地优先 / 20 KB 内核）
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

DOMD 是一个本地优先、内核约 20KB 的开源 Markdown 所见即所得编辑器，基于自研渲染引擎并提供 Web/Tauri 原生版与可用于 AI 流式注入的 CLI。

Tags: #markdown, #wysiwyg-editor, #rendering-engine, #local-first, #tauri

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 高通与字节跳动达成 AI 芯片合作，字节跳动将采购数百万颗定制 ASIC 据消息人士透露，高通已与字节跳动就 AI ASIC 芯片达成合作协议，字节跳动将采购
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

消息称高通与字节跳动达成 AI 定制 ASIC 合作，字节跳动计划采购数百万颗芯片以支撑其 AI 算力需求并推动内部设计量产化。

Tags: #AI芯片, #ASIC, #高通, #字节跳动, #算力基础设施

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 索尼发布 Bravia 9 II 与 7 II，首次将独立 RGB LED 背光带入消费电视
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

索尼发布2026年Bravia 9 II与7 II旗舰液晶电视，采用“True RGB”独立RGB LED背光以提升亮度与色彩体积，并覆盖50-115英寸含首个115英寸机型。

Tags: #Display Technology, #TV Hardware, #RGB LED Backlight, #Mini LED, #Sony

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 美司法部要求 Reddit 和 X 提供批评 ICE 账号信息
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

美国司法部据称以刑事调查为由向 Reddit 和 X 发送大陪审团传票，要求提供批评 ICE 的匿名账号个人与金融信息，相关用户正寻求法院撤销传票。

Tags: #privacy, #law-enforcement, #social-media, #free-speech, #legal

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] Various LLM Smells
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

A post and discussion catalog common stylistic “smells” that reveal LLM-generated text and debate how to use LLMs to improve writing without adopting homogenized phrasing.

Tags: #LLMs, #AI-writing, #prompting, #style-and-linguistics, #Hacker-News

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] Show HN: Continue? Y/N: A 60-second game about AI agent permission fatigue
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

A 60-second game simulating AI agent permission prompts to highlight how users can make unsafe choices under time pressure and prompt fatigue.

Tags: #AI-agents, #security, #human-factors, #developer-tools, #HCI

Read original
